projects.name: specorator
projects.description: The main entry point for the ecosystem. An Obsidian plugin that bundles the 12-stage workflow, Claude Code agents, and (in v2.0) the full runtime and an MCP server into a ready-to-use interface. Agents work natively inside the vault so every project leaves behind a richer, structured knowledge base. No coding required.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: The npm orchestration library for technical builders. Once live, it exposes the full agent lifecycle — session management, event streaming, stage gating — as both a direct API and an MCP server, so any Claude Code session or custom application can drive the workflow engine without the Obsidian plugin.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: TypeScript agent library for technical builders. Provides six specialized roles — PM, Architect, Engineering, QA, Review, and Writer — as composable building blocks, so developers can wire up the same agent intelligence that powers specorator into their own tooling.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: The 12-stage Agentic Development Lifecycle methodology for technical builders — pure CLI and Markdown, no Obsidian required. Planned for MCP server exposure so any Claude Code session can pull in the full workflow engine with a single config line. Also the engine that powers specorator under the hood.
